meaning: adj.有责任的,有义务的,易...的,有...倾向的,负有责任的,很有可能的
examples: Tenants are jointly and severally liable for payment of the rent.
You will be liable for any damage caused.
Offenders are liable to fines of up to $500.
Yet from its very nature it has always and everywhere been liable to dark abuses.
"Ultimately, such behaviour is liable to slow down cross-border business and harm EU consumers, " it said.
